XIV International Scientific Conference NEW ECONOMY 2026

XIV International Scientific Conference NEW ECONOMY 2026

Our University is proud to be among the co-organizers of the international scientific conference titled

"XIV Traditional Scientific Conference NEW ECONOMY 2026,"

which will be held under the theme

“New Horizons: Digital Economy and Responses to a Changing World.”

The conference aims to develop new perspectives on the digital economy, global transformation processes, and economic and social responses to changing world conditions. It will take place on

, in

Bringing together expert academics, researchers, and practitioners, the conference aims to contribute to scientific knowledge sharing and international academic collaboration under the headings of digitalization, innovation, sustainable development, and global economic transformation.

Event Details:

📅

Date:

June 11-12

📍

Location:

School of Business National Louis University, Nowy Sącz and Kraków, Poland

💳

Participation Fee:

120 EUR + VAT (17%) (Excluding accommodation).

📩

E-mail:

novi.economics.institut@gmail.com, info@oikosinstitut.org

Selected papers will have the opportunity to be published in journals indexed in

Scopus and ESCI.

For detailed information:

https://conference.oikosinstitut.org/

DİĞER DUYURULAR
